model: BST-1 High Power Pro Tactile Bass Shaker (50W)
priceNote: approx 2026 (~$50-60 USD at Parts Express/Amazon; official listing 50W 4-ohm shaker)
summary: Budget sim racers adding physical rumble/road-feel to a cockpit or seat without a full motion rig. Key specs: 50 watts RMS power handling, 4 ohms impedance; Frequency response tuned for tactile sub-bass lows (turns any surface into a bass transducer); High-grade aluminum housing, ~3.75 lb weight; Wireable in series (8 ohm), parallel (2 ohm) or series-parallel (4 ohm); Pairs with SA70 amp (single) or SPA250 amp (2-4 shakers).

specs.Highlight 2: Frequency response tuned for tactile sub-bass lows (turns any surface into a bass transducer)
specs.Highlight 4: Wireable in series (8 ohm), parallel (2 ohm) or series-parallel (4 ohm)
specs.Highlight 5: Pairs with SA70 amp (single) or SPA250 amp (2-4 shakers)

pros: 50 watts RMS power handling, 4 ohms impedance

whoFor: Budget sim racers adding physical rumble/road-feel to a cockpit or seat without a full motion rig.
